name: Magnesium
description: Core Magnesium is a premium magnesium product supporting heart, muscle, brain, bone, and whole-body health. Featuring a comprehensive, broad-spectrum blend of clinically studied magnesium chelate including Magtein® and TauroMag®. Magtein® has been shown to provide significant improvement in executive function, working & episodic memory, and attention. This unique formula includes added Magnolia officinalis extract to provide additional stress resilience and healthy cortisol level support
